Queries.ValidateUser: SELECT TOP (1) 1 FROM {schema}.RC_Transection WHERE CBY = @UserId OR QA_EN = @UserId
Queries.ValidateRuncard: SELECT TOP (1) 1 FROM {schema}.Runcard_Detail WHERE RUNCARD = @RuncardNo AND ISNULL(FLAG, '') <> 'C'
Queries.GateGetRuncardFlag: SELECT TOP (1) FLAG FROM {schema}.Runcard_Detail WHERE RUNCARD = @RC
Queries.GateRuncardAtWorkCenter: SELECT TOP (1) 1 FROM {schema}.RC_Transection WHERE RUNCARD = @RC AND WORK_CENTER = @WorkCenter AND ISNULL(CANC_FLAG, '') <> 'X'
Queries.GatePendingActivities: SELECT TOP (1) 1 FROM {schema}.RC_Transection WHERE RUNCARD = @RC AND (@WorkCenter IS NULL OR WORK_CENTER = @WorkCenter) AND (ISNULL(QA_STATUS, '') IN ('WAIT', 'PENDING') OR ISNULL(RECIPE_FLAG, '') = 'P' OR ISNULL(PRD_STATUS, '') IN ('MACHINE_STEP', 'TIMEOUT_PENDING'))
Queries.GateActiveBlocks: SELECT TOP (1) 1 FROM {schema}.RC_Transection WHERE RUNCARD = @RC AND (@WorkCenter IS NULL OR WORK_CENTER = @WorkCenter) AND (ISNULL(B2B_STATUS, '') IN ('HOLD', 'BLOCK', 'Y') OR ISNULL(ERROR, '') <> '' OR ISNULL(EX_STATUS, '') = 'BLOCK')
Queries.GetProductionDetail: SELECT TOP (1) COALESCE(wo.MATERIAL_DESC, rt.MATERIAL_DESC, op.DESCRIPTION, '') AS Description, rd.MATERIAL AS Material, CONVERT(varchar(20), rd.QTY) AS RcQuantity, CONVERT(varchar(20), rd.QTY) AS QtyRc, wo.TARGET_QUANTITY AS QtyWo, rd.DATE_CODE AS DateCode, rd.WO AS WorkOrder, std.MPQ_REEL AS Mpq, rd.ASSY_LOT AS AssyLot, std.WF_LOT AS WaferLot, wo.ORDER_TYPE AS OrderType, wo.UNIT AS Uom, rd.LOT_TYPE AS LotType, CAST(NULL AS varchar(100)) AS ReelNumber FROM {schema}.Runcard_Detail rd LEFT JOIN {schema}.WORKORDER wo ON wo.WO = rd.WO LEFT JOIN {schema}.RC_Transection rt ON rt.RUNCARD = rd.RUNCARD AND rt.ORDERID = rd.WO LEFT JOIN {schema}.OPERATION op ON op.ROUTING_NO = wo.ROUTING_NO LEFT JOIN {schema}.STD_RC_Master std ON std.WO = rd.WO WHERE rd.RUNCARD = @RuncardNo ORDER BY rt.OPERATION
Queries.GetOperTracking: SELECT OPERATION AS Oper, WORK_CENTER AS Wc, COALESCE(DESCRIPTION, WORK_CENTER_TEXT, MATERIAL_DESC) AS Description, WORK_CENTER_TEXT AS WorkCenter, RECEIVE_QTY AS Receive, YIELD AS Yield, SCRAP AS Scrap, MOVE_QTY AS Move, CONVERT(varchar(20), YieldTrig) AS PercentYield, RECEIVE_DATE AS ReceiveDate, CONFIRM_DATE AS ConfirmDate, COALESCE(QA_EN, CBY) AS En FROM {schema}.RC_Transection WHERE RUNCARD = @RuncardNo AND ISNULL(CANC_FLAG, '') <> 'X' ORDER BY OPERATION
Queries.GetRuncardsByWorkOrder: WITH BaseRuncards AS (SELECT rd.RC_TYPE AS Type, rd.RUNCARD AS Rc, rd.ASSY_LOT AS AssyLot, rd.MATERIAL AS Material, rd.QTY AS Qty FROM {schema}.Runcard_Detail rd WHERE rd.WO = @WorkOrderNo AND rd.FLAG = '1') SELECT br.Type AS Type, br.Rc AS Rc, COALESCE(NULLIF(br.AssyLot, ''), NULLIF(br.Material, '')) AS Assy, CONVERT(varchar(20), br.Qty) AS Qty, tx.RcAction AS RcAction, CONCAT('Completion ', CONVERT(varchar(10), COALESCE(tx.CompletionPercent, 0)), '%') AS Status FROM BaseRuncards br OUTER APPLY (SELECT NULLIF(MAX(rt.OPERATION), '') AS RcAction, CASE WHEN COUNT(rt.RUNCARD) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN rt.CONFIRM_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(rt.RUNCARD) END AS CompletionPercent FROM {schema}.RC_Transection rt WHERE rt.RUNCARD = br.Rc) tx ORDER BY br.Rc
Queries.GetMotherQtyForSplit: SELECT TOP (1) CAST(QTY AS int) FROM {schema}.Runcard_Detail WHERE RUNCARD = @MotherRuncard
Queries.GetSplitMotherForClone: SELECT TOP (1) PLANT, WO AS WorkOrder, MATERIAL, RC_TYPE AS RcType, RUNCARD, ASSY_LOT AS AssyLot, DATE_CODE AS DateCode, CAST(QTY AS int) AS Qty, START_WC AS StartWc FROM {schema}.Runcard_Detail WITH (UPDLOCK, HOLDLOCK) WHERE RUNCARD = @MotherRuncard AND ISNULL(FLAG, '') <> 'X' ORDER BY ID DESC
Queries.CountSplitChildren: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM {schema}.RUNCARD_HISTORY WITH (UPDLOCK, HOLDLOCK) WHERE MOTHERRUNCARD = @MotherRuncard
Queries.CountSplitChildrenByMotherDetail: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM {schema}.Runcard_Detail WITH (UPDLOCK, HOLDLOCK) WHERE MOTHER = @MotherRuncard
Queries.GetEmployeeIdByUsername: SELECT TOP (1) USER_EN FROM {schema}.USERLOGIN WHERE USER_LOGIN = @Username OR USER_EN = @Username
Queries.VerifyEmployeeProfile: IF OBJECT_ID(N'dbo.USER_DETAIL', N'U') IS NOT NULL AND COL_LENGTH('dbo.USER_DETAIL', 'USER_EN') IS NOT NULL AND COL_LENGTH('dbo.USER_DETAIL', 'USER_NAME_ENG') IS NOT NULL AND COL_LENGTH('dbo.USER_DETAIL', 'USER_POSITION') IS NOT NULL EXEC sp_executesql N'SELECT TOP (1) CAST(USER_EN AS varchar(50)) AS EmpId, CAST(ISNULL(USER_NAME_ENG, '''') AS varchar(50)) AS EmpName, CAST(ISNULL(USER_POSITION, '''') AS varchar(100)) AS Position FROM dbo.USER_DETAIL WHERE CAST(USER_EN AS varchar(50)) = @EmpId', N'@EmpId varchar(50)', @EmpId = @EmpId ELSE IF OBJECT_ID(N'dbo.USER_DETAIL', N'U') IS NOT NULL AND COL_LENGTH('dbo.USER_DETAIL', 'EMP_ID') IS NOT NULL AND COL_LENGTH('dbo.USER_DETAIL', 'USER_NAME_ENG') IS NOT NULL AND COL_LENGTH('dbo.USER_DETAIL', 'USER_POSITION') IS NOT NULL EXEC sp_executesql N'SELECT TOP (1) CAST(EMP_ID AS varchar(50)) AS EmpId, CAST(ISNULL(USER_NAME_ENG, '''') AS varchar(50)) AS EmpName, CAST(ISNULL(USER_POSITION, '''') AS varchar(100)) AS Position FROM dbo.USER_DETAIL WHERE CAST(EMP_ID AS varchar(50)) = @EmpId', N'@EmpId varchar(50)', @EmpId = @EmpId ELSE IF OBJECT_ID(N'dbo.USER_DETAIL', N'U') IS NOT NULL AND COL_LENGTH('dbo.USER_DETAIL', 'USERLOGIN') IS NOT NULL AND COL_LENGTH('dbo.USER_DETAIL', 'USER_NAME_ENG') IS NOT NULL AND COL_LENGTH('dbo.USER_DETAIL', 'USER_POSITION') IS NOT NULL EXEC sp_executesql N'SELECT TOP (1) CAST(USERLOGIN AS varchar(50)) AS EmpId, CAST(ISNULL(USER_NAME_ENG, '''') AS varchar(50)) AS EmpName, CAST(ISNULL(USER_POSITION, '''') AS varchar(100)) AS Position FROM dbo.USER_DETAIL WHERE CAST(USERLOGIN AS varchar(50)) = @EmpId', N'@EmpId varchar(50)', @EmpId = @EmpId ELSE SELECT TOP (1) CAST(USER_EN AS varchar(50)) AS EmpId, CAST(USER_EN AS varchar(50)) AS EmpName, CAST('' AS varchar(100)) AS Position FROM {schema}.USERLOGIN WHERE CAST(USER_EN AS varchar(50)) = @EmpId
Queries.RuncardExists: SELECT TOP (1) 1 FROM {schema}.Runcard_Detail WITH (UPDLOCK, HOLDLOCK) WHERE RUNCARD = @Runcard
Queries.GetSplitHistory: SELECT CHILDRUNCARD AS Runcard, CHILDASSYRUNCARD AS AssyLot, CHILDQTY AS Qty, MOTHERRUNCARD AS Mother, MOTHERQTY AS MotherQty, WORKCENTER AS Wc, CDATE AS Cdate FROM {schema}.RUNCARD_HISTORY WHERE MOTHERRUNCARD = @RC OR CHILDRUNCARD = @RC ORDER BY CDATE DESC
Queries.GetMergeRuncardRows: SELECT RUNCARD AS Runcard, WO AS WorkOrder, ASSY_LOT AS AssyLot, CAST(QTY AS int) AS Qty FROM {schema}.Runcard_Detail WITH (UPDLOCK, HOLDLOCK) WHERE RUNCARD IN ({RuncardList}) AND ISNULL(FLAG, '') <> 'X'
Queries.GetSaveConfirmContext: SELECT TOP (1) rd.WO AS WorkOrder, COALESCE(CONVERT(varchar(50), wo.ROUTING_NO), CONVERT(varchar(50), rt.ROUTING_NO), '') AS RoutingNo, COALESCE(rd.MATERIAL, wo.MATERIAL, rt.MATERIAL, '') AS Material, COALESCE(wo.MATERIAL_DESC, rt.MATERIAL_DESC, '') AS MaterialDesc, COALESCE(wo.UNIT, 'PC') AS Unit, rd.RUNCARD AS Runcard, COALESCE(NULLIF(@Operation, ''), rt.OPERATION) AS Operation, COALESCE(NULLIF(@WorkCenter, ''), rt.WORK_CENTER, rd.START_WC) AS WorkCenter, COALESCE(rt.WORK_CENTER_TEXT, rt.DESCRIPTION, '') AS WorkCenterText, CAST(COALESCE(NULLIF(rt.RECEIVE_QTY, 0), rd.QTY, 0) AS int) AS ReceiveQty, COALESCE(rt.DESCRIPTION, '') AS Description FROM {schema}.Runcard_Detail rd LEFT JOIN {schema}.WORKORDER wo ON wo.WO = rd.WO OUTER APPLY (SELECT TOP (1) * FROM {schema}.RC_Transection tx WHERE tx.RUNCARD = rd.RUNCARD AND ISNULL(tx.CANC_FLAG, '') <> 'X' ORDER BY CASE WHEN tx.CONFIRM_DATE IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, tx.OPERATION) rt WHERE rd.RUNCARD = @RuncardNo
Queries.GetConfirmStandards: SELECT CAST(0 AS decimal(18,2)) AS MCTime, CAST(0 AS decimal(18,2)) AS LaborTime
Queries.GetHoldReasons: SELECT Reason_Code AS ReasonCode, Description FROM {schema}.REASON_MASTER WHERE Reason_Group IN ('INT', 'MFG', 'STOP', 'ENG') AND (Reason_Code LIKE 'H%' OR UPPER(ISNULL(Description, '')) LIKE '%HOLD%') ORDER BY Reason_Group, Reason_Code
Queries.GetRejectReasons: SELECT ReasonCode, Description, ReasonGroup FROM {schema}.REJECT_REASON ORDER BY ReasonGroup, ReasonCode
Queries.GetRejectCurrentQty: SELECT TOP (1) CAST(QTY AS int) FROM {schema}.Runcard_Detail WITH (UPDLOCK, HOLDLOCK) WHERE RUNCARD = @RuncardNo AND ISNULL(FLAG, '') <> 'X' ORDER BY ID DESC
Queries.InsertRejectDetail: INSERT INTO {schema}.REJECT_DETAIL (WO, RUNCARD, WC_NO, OPERATION, REJECT_QTY, REASON_CODE, REASON_DESC, STATION, CBY, CDATE) VALUES (@Wo, @Runcard, @WcNo, @Operation, @RejectQty, @ReasonCode, @ReasonDesc, @Station, @Cby, @Cdate)
Queries.VoidSplitMother: UPDATE {schema}.Runcard_Detail SET FLAG = 'X', CBY = @Cby WHERE RUNCARD = @MotherRuncard AND ISNULL(FLAG, '') <> 'X'
Queries.InsertSplitMotherClone: INSERT INTO {schema}.Runcard_Detail (PLANT, WO, MATERIAL, RC_TYPE, RUNCARD, ASSY_LOT, DATE_CODE, QTY, OLD_QTY, START_WC, FLAG, CBY, CDATE) VALUES (@Plant, @WorkOrder, @Material, @RcType, @MotherRuncard, @MotherAssy, @DateCode, @RemainingQty, @OriginalQty, @StartWc, '1', @Cby, @Cdate)
Queries.InsertSplitChildLot: INSERT INTO {schema}.Runcard_Detail (PLANT, WO, MATERIAL, RC_TYPE, RUNCARD, ASSY_LOT, DATE_CODE, QTY, OLD_QTY, MOTHER, MOTHER_QTY, START_WC, FLAG, CBY, CDATE) VALUES (@Plant, @ChildWo, @Material, @RcType, @NewRuncard, @NewAssy, @DateCode, @SplitQty, @OriginalQty, @MotherRuncard, @MotherQty, @WorkCenter, '1', @Cby, @Cdate)
Queries.InsertMergeCombinedRuncard: INSERT INTO {schema}.Runcard_Detail (PLANT, WO, MATERIAL, RC_TYPE, RUNCARD, ASSY_LOT, DATE_CODE, QTY, OLD_QTY, START_WC, FLAG, CBY, CDATE) VALUES (@Plant, @WorkOrder, @Material, @RcType, @NewRuncard, @NewAssy, @DateCode, @TotalQty, @OriginalQty, @StartWc, '1', @Cby, @Cdate)
Queries.InsertSplitHistory: INSERT INTO {schema}.RUNCARD_HISTORY (RCTYPE, MOTHERWO, MOTHERRUNCARD, MOTHERASSYRUNCARD, MOTHERQTY, CHILDWO, CHILDRUNCARD, CHILDASSYRUNCARD, CHILDQTY, SUMQTY, B2BQTY, WORKCENTER, OPERATION, CBY, CDATE) VALUES ('SPLIT', @MotherWo, @MotherRuncard, @MotherAssy, @MotherQty, @ChildWo, @NewRuncard, @NewAssy, @SplitQty, @SumQty, @B2BQty, @WorkCenter, @Operation, @Cby, @Cdate)
Queries.InsertMergeHistory: INSERT INTO {schema}.RUNCARD_HISTORY (RCTYPE, MOTHERWO, MOTHERRUNCARD, MOTHERASSYRUNCARD, MOTHERQTY, CHILDWO, CHILDRUNCARD, CHILDASSYRUNCARD, CHILDQTY, SUMQTY, B2BQTY, WORKCENTER, OPERATION, CBY, CDATE) VALUES ('MERGE', @MotherWo, @MainRuncard, @MotherAssy, @MotherQty, @ChildWo, @SourceRuncard, @SourceAssy, @SourceQty, @SumQty, @B2BQty, @WorkCenter, @Operation, @Cby, @Cdate)
Queries.InsertHoldHistory: INSERT INTO {schema}.RUNCARD_HISTORY (RCTYPE, MOTHERWO, MOTHERRUNCARD, CHILDRUNCARD, WORKCENTER, OPERATION, HOLDREMARK, HOLDCOMMENT, RELEASECOMMENT, CBY, CDATE) VALUES (@ActionType, @WorkOrder, @Runcard, @Runcard, @WorkCenter, @Operation, @SelectReason, @HoldComment, @ReleaseComment, @Cby, @Cdate)
Queries.UpdateMotherQtyAfterSplit: UPDATE {schema}.Runcard_Detail SET QTY = QTY - @SplitQty, OLD_QTY = COALESCE(OLD_QTY, QTY), FLAG = 'X' WHERE RUNCARD = @MotherRuncard AND QTY >= @SplitQty
Queries.DeductRejectQty: UPDATE {schema}.Runcard_Detail SET QTY = QTY - @RejectQty, OLD_QTY = COALESCE(OLD_QTY, QTY), CBY = @Cby WHERE RUNCARD = @RuncardNo AND ISNULL(FLAG, '') <> 'X' AND QTY >= @RejectQty
Queries.UpdateMainRuncardQtyForMerge: UPDATE {schema}.Runcard_Detail SET QTY = QTY + @TotalSourceQty, OLD_QTY = COALESCE(OLD_QTY, QTY) WHERE RUNCARD = @MainRuncard
Queries.CloseSourceRuncardsForMerge: UPDATE {schema}.Runcard_Detail SET FLAG = 'X' WHERE RUNCARD IN ({RuncardList})
Queries.UpdateActiveTransactionSplitFlag: UPDATE {schema}.RC_Transection SET FLAG_SPLIT = 'Y', SPLIT_TO = @SplitTo, UDATE = @Cdate, CBY = @Cby WHERE RUNCARD = @MotherRuncard AND ISNULL(CANC_FLAG, '') <> 'X'
Queries.CloneSplitTransactionsForMother: INSERT INTO {schema}.RC_Transection (PLANT, ORDERID, ROUTING_NO, MATERIAL, MATERIAL_DESC, RUNCARD, OPERATION, WORK_CENTER, WORK_CENTER_TEXT, DESCRIPTION, RECEIVE_QTY, CDATE, CBY, FLAG) SELECT PLANT, ORDERID, ROUTING_NO, MATERIAL, MATERIAL_DESC, @MotherRuncard, OPERATION, WORK_CENTER, WORK_CENTER_TEXT, DESCRIPTION, RECEIVE_QTY, @Cdate, @Cby, FLAG FROM {schema}.RC_Transection WHERE RUNCARD = @MotherRuncard AND ISNULL(CANC_FLAG, '') <> 'X' AND ISNULL(FLAG_SPLIT, '') = 'Y'
Queries.CloneSplitTransactionsForChild: INSERT INTO {schema}.RC_Transection (PLANT, ORDERID, ROUTING_NO, MATERIAL, MATERIAL_DESC, RUNCARD, OPERATION, WORK_CENTER, WORK_CENTER_TEXT, DESCRIPTION, RECEIVE_QTY, CDATE, CBY, FLAG) SELECT PLANT, ORDERID, ROUTING_NO, MATERIAL, MATERIAL_DESC, @ChildRuncard, OPERATION, WORK_CENTER, WORK_CENTER_TEXT, DESCRIPTION, @SplitQty, @Cdate, @Cby, FLAG FROM {schema}.RC_Transection WHERE RUNCARD = @MotherRuncard AND ISNULL(CANC_FLAG, '') <> 'X' AND ISNULL(FLAG_SPLIT, '') = 'Y'
Queries.FlagMergeTransactions: UPDATE {schema}.RC_Transection SET FLAG_MERGE = 'Y' WHERE RUNCARD IN ({RuncardList}) AND ISNULL(CANC_FLAG, '') <> 'X'
Queries.CloneMergeTransactionsForCombined: INSERT INTO {schema}.RC_Transection (PLANT, ORDERID, ROUTING_NO, MATERIAL, MATERIAL_DESC, RUNCARD, OPERATION, WORK_CENTER, WORK_CENTER_TEXT, DESCRIPTION, RECEIVE_QTY, CDATE, CBY, FLAG) SELECT PLANT, ORDERID, ROUTING_NO, MATERIAL, MATERIAL_DESC, @NewRuncard, OPERATION, WORK_CENTER, WORK_CENTER_TEXT, DESCRIPTION, @TotalQty, @Cdate, @Cby, FLAG FROM {schema}.RC_Transection WHERE RUNCARD = @MainRuncard AND ISNULL(CANC_FLAG, '') <> 'X' AND ISNULL(FLAG_MERGE, '') = 'Y'
Queries.UpdateActiveTransactionMergeFlag: UPDATE {schema}.RC_Transection SET FLAG_MERGE = 'X', MERGE_FROM = @MergeFrom WHERE RUNCARD = @MainRuncard AND ISNULL(CANC_FLAG, '') <> 'X'
Queries.UpdateHoldTransactionStatus: UPDATE {schema}.RC_Transection SET B2B_STATUS = 'HOLD', PRD_STATUS = 'HOLD', QA_REASON = @SelectReason, REASONCODE = @SelectReason, UDATE = @Cdate, CBY = @Cby WHERE RUNCARD = @Runcard AND ISNULL(CANC_FLAG, '') <> 'X' AND (@WorkCenter IS NULL OR @WorkCenter = '' OR WORK_CENTER = @WorkCenter)
Queries.ReleaseHoldTransactionStatus: UPDATE {schema}.RC_Transection SET B2B_STATUS = NULL, PRD_STATUS = CASE WHEN PRD_STATUS = 'HOLD' THEN NULL ELSE PRD_STATUS END, QA_REASON = NULL, REASONCODE = NULL, UDATE = @Cdate, CBY = @Cby WHERE RUNCARD = @Runcard AND ISNULL(CANC_FLAG, '') <> 'X' AND (@WorkCenter IS NULL OR @WorkCenter = '' OR WORK_CENTER = @WorkCenter)
Queries.SaveProduction: UPDATE {schema}.RC_Transection SET PLANT = @Plant, ORDERID = @WorkOrder, ROUTING_NO = @RoutingNo, MATERIAL = @Material, MATERIAL_DESC = @MaterialDesc, OPERATION = @Operation, WORK_CENTER = @WorkCenter, WORK_CENTER_TEXT = @WorkCenterText, RECEIVE_QTY = @ReceiveQty, RECEIVE_BY = @UserId, POSTG_DATE = @PostingDate, YIELD = @GoodQty, MOVE_QTY = @GoodQty, SCRAP = @ScrapQty, YieldTrig = @YieldTrig, CONF_QUAN_UNIT = @ConfQuanUnit, CONF_ACTIVITY1 = @ConfActivity1, CONF_ACTI_UNIT1 = 'MIN', CONF_ACTIVITY2 = @ConfActivity2, CONF_ACTI_UNIT2 = 'MIN', CONF_ACTIVITY3 = @ConfActivity3, CONF_ACTI_UNIT3 = 'MIN', EXEC_START_DATE = @ExecStartDate, EXEC_START_TIME = @ExecStartTime, EXEC_FIN_DATE = @ExecFinDate, EXEC_FIN_TIME = @ExecFinTime, BREAK_TIME = @BreakTime, BREAK_UNIT = 'MIN', CONF_TEXT = @RuncardNo, TYPE = @ResultType, MESSAGE = @ResultMessage, SAP_FLAG = 'X', FLAG = '1', CBY = @UserId, PRD_STATUS = 'CONFIRM', UDATE = @ConfirmDate, CONFIRM_DATE = @ConfirmDate WHERE RUNCARD = @RuncardNo AND ISNULL(CANC_FLAG, '') <> 'X' AND (WORK_CENTER = @WorkCenter OR @WorkCenter IS NULL); IF @@ROWCOUNT = 0 INSERT INTO {schema}.RC_Transection (PLANT, ORDERID, ROUTING_NO, MATERIAL, MATERIAL_DESC, RUNCARD, OPERATION, WORK_CENTER, WORK_CENTER_TEXT, RECEIVE_QTY, RECEIVE_BY, POSTG_DATE, YIELD, SCRAP, MOVE_QTY, YieldTrig, CONF_QUAN_UNIT, CONF_ACTIVITY1, CONF_ACTI_UNIT1, CONF_ACTIVITY2, CONF_ACTI_UNIT2, CONF_ACTIVITY3, CONF_ACTI_UNIT3, EXEC_START_DATE, EXEC_START_TIME, EXEC_FIN_DATE, EXEC_FIN_TIME, BREAK_TIME, BREAK_UNIT, CONF_TEXT, TYPE, MESSAGE, SAP_FLAG, PRD_STATUS, RECEIVE_DATE, CONFIRM_DATE, CDATE, UDATE, CBY, FLAG) VALUES (@Plant, @WorkOrder, @RoutingNo, @Material, @MaterialDesc, @RuncardNo, @Operation, @WorkCenter, @WorkCenterText, @ReceiveQty, @UserId, @PostingDate, @GoodQty, @ScrapQty, @GoodQty, @YieldTrig, @ConfQuanUnit, @ConfActivity1, 'MIN', @ConfActivity2, 'MIN', @ConfActivity3, 'MIN', @ExecStartDate, @ExecStartTime, @ExecFinDate, @ExecFinTime, @BreakTime, 'MIN', @RuncardNo, @ResultType, @ResultMessage, 'X', 'CONFIRM', @ReceiveDate, @ConfirmDate, @ReceiveDate, @ConfirmDate, @UserId, '1')
